title: Masky Food Animations
body:
This ResourcePack adds animations to absolutely all Minecraft foods without using any mod adding a beautiful touch to the game, available for Vanilla +1.21.4
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HQSgfK6mOd4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This package contains:
Animations for:
- 🍎Apple, Golden Apple
- 🌰Enchanted Golden Apple Beetroot
- 🥔Potato, Baked Potato, Poisonous Potato
- 🥩Beef, Cooked Beef
- 🥕Carrot, Golden Carrot
- 🍗Chicken, Cooked Chicken
- 🐟Cod, Cooked Cod
- 🐟Salmon, Cooked Salmon
- 🍖Mutton, Cooked Mutton
- 🍖Porkchop, Cooked Porkchop
- 🍖Rabbit, Cooked Rabbit
- 🍪Cookie, Pumpkin Pie
- 🧈Glow Berries, Sweet Berries
- 🐡PufferFish, Tropical Fish
- 🍉Melon Slice, Bread
- 🥓Rotten Flesh, Chorus Fruit
- ⚗Spider Eye, Dried Kelp, All Potion
- 🧴Honey Bottle, Ominous Bottle
- 🍄Mushroom Stew, Beetroot Soup
- 🥣Rabbit Stew, Suspicious Stew

Inspiration:
- [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/tasty-items-vanilla-eating-animations/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/tasty-items-vanilla-eating-animations/)
